data.body: PR opened: https://github.com/jannar18/fractal-nyc/pull/89 — prototype of scroll-driven octahedron unfold. Build green (pnpm build). Pre-existing 4 test failures on master are unchanged (footer/navbar/neighborhood — unrelated). Hard constraint respected: FractalCityScene / OctahedronHero were not touched; the animation is a new section inserted between Hero and HouseBannerGrid. See PR body for what is rough and left for polish (Stage 1 silhouette, banner alignment via ResizeObserver, F lettermark rotation, wordmark shift-left).
Saved for later — prototype works but needs polish (silhouette geometry, real ResizeObserver banner alignment, F lettermark, easing). PR #89 converted to draft.
